name: Eggnog Snickerdoodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a 3-quart mixer bowl, combine all cookie ingredients and beat at low speed until well mixed (2-4 minutes).
3. In a small bowl, combine the sugar mixture; stir to blend.
4. Shape rounded teaspoons of dough into 1-inch balls and roll in the sugar mixture.
5. Place the balls 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake near the center of the 400°F oven for 8-10 minutes or until edges are lightly browned.
